channel.title: Pharma AI & Data Watch
channel.description: Curated AI, pharma, and regulatory science intelligence — updated weekly.

item.title: STAT+: Sword Health contracted to provide AI-supported physical therapy for an entire country
item.description: Portugal's National Health Service signed a deal with digital health company Sword for its AI-assisted virtual physical therapy care.

item.title: STAT+: AI scientist company Edison Scientific tapped by team behind Metsera to create new biotechs
item.description: Edison Scientific and investment firm Population Health Partners are teaming up to leverage AI agents in drug discovery and development.

item.title: Mental Health Treatment Among Adults: United States, 2024
item.description: This report analyzes 2024 National Health Interview Survey data to examine the prevalence of prescription medication use for mental health conditions and receipt of counseling or therapy from mental health professionals among U.S. adults over a 12-month period, stratified by selected demographic and

item.title: Ripienaar/free-for-dev: a list of saas, paas and iaas offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev - ripienaar/free-for-dev

item.title: Bridging labs and markets: how the new indo-swiss partnership is reshaping global health technology - prevention is better than cure
item.description: Spread the Message NEW DELHI / ZURICH — In a major push to convert high-level scientific research into real-world medical solutions, India and Switzerland have significantly expanded their bilateral innovation partnership this month. Building on…

item.title: Sui launches seal mpc framework to secure autonomous AI agent transactions
item.description: Sui Launches Seal MPC Framework to Secure Autonomous AI Agent Transactions: a fresh look at Sui Seal MPC AI agents, market context, key risks, and what tra

item.title: Ripple secures preliminary luxembourg approval to prepare mica-compliant xrp and rlusd operations
item.description: Ripple Secures Preliminary Luxembourg Approval to Prepare MiCA-Compliant XRP and RLUSD Operations: a fresh look at Ripple MiCA Luxembourg CASP, market cont

item.title: Sol strategies stock jumps 22% as corporate solana treasury model gains attention
item.description: Sol Strategies Stock Jumps 22% as Corporate Solana Treasury Model Gains Attention: a fresh look at Sol Strategies STKE Solana treasury, market context, key

item.title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
item.description: Dilip Asbe said that newer UPI apps could be more competitive with a viable commercial model

item.title: Specialist Inpatient Detoxification from Gabapentinoids: Clinical and Demographic Characteristics and Predictors of Outcome
item.description: This study examines clinical and demographic characteristics of patients undergoing specialist inpatient detoxification from gabapentinoids and identifies predictors of treatment outcome. Conducted at an NHS addictions service in Greater Manchester, the research provides insights into patient profil

item.title: Digital health tools are transforming patient care models
item.description: Digital health tools are transforming patient care models by connecting AI diagnostics, remote monitoring, and pharma data into more responsive care delivery.

item.title: A mcmaster university AI model called synthemol-rl designed a new antibiotic candidate by searching a chemical space of 46 billion possible compounds — a scale far beyond physical lab screens, which usually test hundreds of thousands to a few million molecules.
item.description: A McMaster AI model reportedly searched 46 billion possible compounds for a new antibiotic candidate, showing how computational chemical space can exceed physical screening. The post A McMaster University AI model called SyntheMol-RL designed a new antibiotic…

item.title: AI accelerates protein discovery at university of utah symposium
item.description: Speakers from the University of Utah and beyond gathered at the U on June 25 to feature in the AI in Protein Structure, Function and Discovery Symposium to showcase recent developments in science and technology. Held at the Eccles Health Sciences Education bu…

item.title: Anthropic’s mythos 5 is back
item.description: After a rollercoaster negotiation process with the Trump administration that dragged on for two weeks, Anthropic's Mythos 5 is finally back in action - at least, somewhat, for a select group of organizations, according to a letter from the government to Anthr…

item.title: India's digital health ecosystem set for a boost with new initiatives
item.description: Union Minister JP Nadda will launch several digital health initiatives on June 29, including Aarogya Setu 2.0 and an upgraded Ayushman App. The move aims to enhance healthcare accessibility, interoperability, and create a connected ecosystem.

item.title: How ai-led fraud detection is reshaping health insurance claims management in india - elets ehealth
item.description: Over the past decade, health insurance in India has moved from being a niche financial product to a near-essential household necessity, with millions of new policyholders entering the system every year.

item.title: It's looking like a hot, messy summer for security teams as AI finds countless previously hidden vulns
item.description: Time to start praying to the goddess of wisdom and war

item.title: Trump admin releases anthropic mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies | techcrunch
item.description: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.

item.title: Trump administration allows anthropic to release mythos to select US organizations
item.description: After weeks of negotiations, the White House permitted Anthropic to restore access to its most advanced AI model for a select group of US companies and government agencies.

item.title: Diagnostic accuracy of synovial fluid progranulin vs. C-reactive protein in septic arthritis: a comparative biomarker study
item.description: This comparative biomarker study evaluated the diagnostic accuracy of synovial fluid progranulin versus C-reactive protein for identifying septic arthritis. The research directly compared these two biomarkers' performance as diagnostic tools in synovial fluid analysis. This work provides evidence on

item.title: Patient-Specific Determinants of Response to BCMA- and GPRC5D-Targeted CAR T-Cell Therapy in Multiple Myeloma: A QSP Analysis of Clinical Trial and Real-World Data
item.description: This quantitative systems pharmacology analysis integrated clinical trial and real-world data to identify patient-specific factors that determine treatment response to BCMA- and GPRC5D-targeted CAR T-cell therapies in multiple myeloma patients. The study applied computational modeling to characteriz

item.title: AI in Drug Discovery and Development
item.description: This review examines the application of artificial intelligence in drug discovery and development, with a focus on oncology and hematology. The article discusses how AI technologies are being integrated into translational research and cancer therapeutics to advance the drug development pipeline. The

item.title: Duplex Ultrasound Surveillance After Endovascular Therapy for Peripheral Arterial Disease: A Retrospective Cohort Study
item.description: This retrospective cohort study evaluates the use of duplex ultrasound surveillance in monitoring patients after endovascular therapy for peripheral arterial disease. The research was conducted at Prince of Wales Hospital in Sydney and involved investigators from the University of New South Wales. T

item.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
item.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

item.title: Machine learning is enabling a new era for precision medicine and pharmacogenomics
item.description: Machine learning has unlocked significant value across the entire healthcare delivery lifecycle.

item.title: Telehealth for mental health is now mainstream, but AI note-taking tools show major quality gaps
item.description: Mental health telehealth is booming in 2026, but AI scribes used in virtual visits show quality gaps versus human notes. No regulatory standards exist yet. Here's what patients should know.

item.title: Silicon valley backed trump to kill AI regulation, now the industry is begging for rules
item.description: The AI industry that donated heavily to elect Donald Trump on the promise he would leave the technology alone is now asking for formal regulation, Politico reported on Friday. Executives at frontier AI companies told the outlet they view the administration’s …

item.title: Galaxy watch health data is shaping samsung’s future clinical research
item.description: Galaxy Watch health data is becoming one of Samsung’s most valuable assets in advancing clinical research and digital healthcare. As wearable technology evolves beyond fitness tracking, Samsung is using health insights collected from Galaxy Watch devices to s…

item.title: Ripple partners with sbi holdings for japan rlusd stablecoin launch after jfsa green light
item.description: Ripple Partners With SBI Holdings for Japan RLUSD Stablecoin Launch After JFSA Green Light: a fresh look at Ripple RLUSD Japan, market context, key risks,

item.title: Elon musk’s x money rolls out with cross river bank rails, but ripple link needs careful framing
item.description: Elon Musk’s X Money Rolls Out With Cross River Bank Rails, But Ripple Link Needs Careful Framing: a fresh look at X Money Cross River Bank Ripple, market c

item.title: Xrp prepares for july bounce-back as price history points to positive third quarter seasonality
item.description: XRP Prepares for July Bounce-Back as Price History Points to Positive Third Quarter Seasonality: a fresh look at XRP July seasonality, market context, key

item.title: Chainlink powering tradfi future? dtcc appchain and project pangea put link middleware in focus
item.description: Chainlink Powering TradFi Future? DTCC AppChain and Project Pangea Put LINK Middleware in Focus: a fresh look at Chainlink DTCC Project Pangea, market cont

item.title: Cardano whales intensify accumulation near multi-month lows as futures interest grows
item.description: Cardano Whales Intensify Accumulation Near Multi-Month Lows as Futures Interest Grows: a fresh look at Cardano whale accumulation, market context, key risk

item.title: Solana sol reclaims $72, but fading on-chain metrics signal weakening dex momentum
item.description: Solana SOL Reclaims $72, But Fading On-Chain Metrics Signal Weakening DEX Momentum: a fresh look at Solana on-chain metrics, market context, key risks, and

item.title: Softbank’s CEO isn’t the only one with questions about elon musk's orbital data center hype | techcrunch
item.description: SoftBank’s CEO isn’t the only one with questions about Elon Musk's orbital data center hype | TechCrunchtechcrunch.com

item.title: Apple vision pro exec is reportedly leaving for openai
item.description: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

item.title: Why is apple asking me to pay more for big tech’s AI obsession?
item.description: Tim Cook recently said price increases were "unavoidable" and described the company's pricing as "unsustainable." The 16-inch MacBook Pro saw its price go up by $300. The 11-inch iPad Air went from $599 to $749. Even the HomePod Mini got a $30 bump to $129. C…

item.title: Security news this week: lastpass users had their data stolen—again
item.description: Plus: Former national security advisor John Bolton pleads guilty in classified-materials case, Microsoft helps take down major infostealer infrastructure, and more.

item.title: Near-perfect genome sequencing in medical genetics
item.description: This Perspective introduces near-perfect genome sequencing, which encompasses diploid genome assembly, pangenome references and artificial intelligence-driven variant interpretation, and proposes a roadmap toward its clinical implementation.

item.title: Midjourney's ambitious full-body 'scan spa' sounds almost too good to be true
item.description: A company known for its AI image generation has made a surprise pivot – to consumer healthcare. Midjourney has announced it will offer a "new form of medical imaging" using echolocation to map the body, in a day-spa setting, with the first center to open to t…

item.title: Who will control africa’s AI infrastructure, and at what cost?
item.description: Data centres and AI systems are expanding across Africa, bringing new pressure on energy and resources.

item.title: Generative ai-enabled clinical decision support system in primary care: a pragmatic, cluster-randomized trial
item.description: A pragmatic cluster-randomized trial found that ChatGPT-4o-assisted decision support in Kenyan primary care facilities did not significantly reduce 14-day treatment failure over usual care.

item.title: Chinese cybersecurity company claims it’s built a better-than-mythos bug finder
item.description: Qihoo 360, which the US has banned, says it’s needed as a deterrent to weaponized Anthropic models

item.title: Anthropic thinks its own success is key to making AI safe
item.description: Anthropic's critics argue it's rapidly accumulating power. The company says that's what responsible AI development looks like.

item.title: Development of APH003─a Highly Potent, Selective, and Orally Bioavailable IRAK4 PROTAC Degrader for the Treatment of Inflammatory Diseases
item.description: APH003 is a highly potent and selective PROTAC degrader of IRAK4 developed for treating inflammatory diseases, with demonstrated oral bioavailability. The compound was developed through collaborative research involving Sun Yat-Sen University and ApicHope Pharmaceutical Group. PROTAC technology enabl

item.title: FDA Proposes Rule That Would Help Hold Foreign Tobacco Product Manufacturers Accountable, Protect Public Health
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration today issued a proposed rule that, if finalized, would help protect the public health of Americans, including youth, by strengthening the agency’s ability to efficiently identify illegal foreign tobacco products — including youth-appealing e-cigarettes — and con

item.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
item.description: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

item.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
item.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building

item.title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
item.description: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

item.title: OpenAI’s Jalapeño chip is Big Tech’s spiciest move away from Nvidia
item.description: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building
